# Expectation {#sec-4}

{{< include ch04/_04-03-variance.qmd >}}

{{< include ch04/_04-04-moments.qmd >}}

{{< include ch04/_04-05-mean-and-median.qmd >}}

{{< include ch04/_04-06-covariance-corr.qmd >}}

{{< include ch04/_04-07-conditional-exp.qmd >}}

{{< include ch04/_04-08-utility.qmd >}}

{{< include ch04/_04-09-exercises.qmd >}}
